class.name: PlayFabTitleData
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.title_data[/code]. This service wraps client-safe PlayFab title-data, publisher-data, title-news, and server-time APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: get_publisher_data_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFTitleDataManagementClientGetPublisherData[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_time_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFTitleDataManagementClientGetTime[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_title_data_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFTitleDataManagementClientGetTitleData[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_title_news_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFTitleDataManagementClientGetTitleNews[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.
